creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have written a header set that provides compatibility, but it doesn't
work with all ports.

You can download it here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~mm/ports/devel_libevent.tar.gz

The following ports do not build with it and need fixing (or some other
adjustments to the wrapper need to be done):
net/honeyd
net/libevnet
net/relayd
net/spserver
security/fragroute
sysutils/tmux

All other ports depending on libevent I tested build ok.
Another option is to find a way to support both versions of libevent
installed.
